# `generateSchema`

Generated reference page for the `generateSchema` function export.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/json-schema/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/json-schema/index.ts:124`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/json-schema/index.ts#L124)

## Signatures

```ts
function generateSchema(
  schema: CLISchema,
  options?: JsonSchemaOptions,
): Record<string, unknown>;
```

| Parameter | Type                          | Description                              |
| --------- | ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `schema`  | `schema: CLISchema`           | The CLI schema from `CLIBuilder.schema`. |
| `options` | `options?: JsonSchemaOptions` | Generation options.                      |

## Examples

```ts
const app = cli('myapp').version('1.0.0').command(deploy);
const definition = generateSchema(app.schema);
writeFileSync('cli-schema.json', JSON.stringify(definition, null, 2));
```
